title: Welcome to the Web Bootcamp

communityCta: Become a member of the community ✦
heroSubtitle: Intensive Web Development bootcamp designed for fast learning and high-impact careers. Go from zero to job-ready in 12 weeks.
featuresSubtitle: Our curriculum is designed by industry professionals, for the professionals of tomorrow.
card1Desc: Master React, Git, Node.js, and modern CSS. Learn the exact toolkit used by top tech companies to build scalable web applications.
card2Desc: Access our premium Coworking Space and startup Incubator. Build your network with dedicated career coaching and interview preparation.
card3Desc: Graduate with officially recognized certifications. Prove your skills with a strong portfolio of real-world projects and assessments.
curriculumSubtitle: 12 intensive weeks taking you from foundations to full-stack, job-ready engineer.
contactSubtitle: Ready to join the next Web Development cohort? Leave us your details and our advisor will reach out within 24h.
footerTagline: Algeria's premier tech bootcamp. We turn beginners into job-ready developers in 12 weeks.
freeAppointmentModalTitle: Free Appointment with our Educational Consultants

curriculumModules.title: Web Foundations & Git
topics: Understanding how the Internet and Web work
Introduction to servers, browsers, and HTTP
HTML page structure and essential tags
Introduction to versioning, Git, and GitHub

curriculumModules.title: Advanced CSS & Animations
topics: The Box Model and CSS Selectors

curriculumModules.title: Algorithms & JavaScript Logic
topics: Variables, loops, and conditions in JavaScript

curriculumModules.title: The DOM & Final Project
topics: Advanced user events and form validation
Building and presenting a functional website

uiuxHeroSubtitle: Go from absolute beginner to a confident UI/UX Designer in 12 weeks. Learn wireframing, prototyping, user research, and Figma mastery.
uiuxFeaturesTitle: Everything You Need to Design Like a Pro
uiuxFeaturesSubtitle: A creative curriculum built purely to construct beautiful, user-centric interfaces.
uiuxCard1Desc: Master auto-layout, components, and variables like a true professional.
uiuxCard2Desc: Understand your users, build personas, and master the art of UX interviews to make data-driven design choices.
uiuxCard3Desc: Breathe life into static screens with advanced micro-interactions.
uiuxCard4Desc: Build scalable, consistent UI kits utilized by top-tier product teams.
uiuxCurriculumSubtitle: An intensive, hands-on syllabus designed to get you hired as a UI/UX Designer.

uiuxCurriculumModules.title: UX Intro, Research & Analysis
topics: User Journey Maps and competitor analysis

uiuxCurriculumModules.title: Ideation, Architecture & Wireframing
topics: Brainstorming, User Flows & defining the MVP

uiuxCurriculumModules.title: UI Design, Systems & High Fidelity
topics: Building UI Kits and reusable components
Organizing a Design System in Figma

uiuxCurriculumModules.title: Prototyping, Testing & Final Project
topics: Comprehensive final project: UX Case Study

uiuxWorkSubtitle: Explore the incredible interfaces built by our recent graduates.
uiuxTestimonial1Quote: The mentorship in this UI/UX bootcamp elevated my design thinking. I landed a role as a Product Designer right after graduation.
uiuxTestimonial2Quote: I finally understand how to build robust Design Systems. Figma went from feeling intimidating to feeling like home.
uiuxTestimonial3Quote: The focus on actual User Research, not just making screens look pretty, was the game changer for my career path.
cyberIntroHeroSubtitle: Go from beginner to confident in 12 weeks. Learn network scanning, vulnerability assessment, and basic cybersecurity concepts in our comprehensive Introduction program.
cyberIntroCertSubtitle: Build a strong foundation in cybersecurity with our rigorous, hands-on 12-week labs.
cyberIntroCard1Desc: Learn practical attacks on networks and hosts, simulating real-world threat actor behaviors.
cyberIntroCard2Desc: Identify and exploit vulnerabilities in modern web applications, mastering essential security concepts.
cyberIntroCard3Desc: Master scanning tools, interpret results, and define actionable remediation strategies.
cyberIntroCard4Desc: Practice with real-world scenarios to guarantee your understanding of core cybersecurity principles.
cyberIntroCurriculumSubtitle: A hands-on curriculum designed to take you from zero to confident in cybersecurity fundamentals.

cyberIntroCurriculumModules.title: Foundations: Cybersecurity & Networks
topics: How the Internet works: IP, DNS, HTTP/HTTPS, OSI
Practical networks: DHCP, ARP, Wi-Fi, NAT
Labs: Wireshark, Nmap, DNS spoofing simulation

cyberIntroCurriculumModules.title: Linux, CLI & Web Security
topics: Bash scripting, grep, awk, sed & log analysis
OWASP Top 10, cookies, sessions & CSRF basics
Labs: Kali intro, command-line challenges, XSS & DVWA

cyberIntroCurriculumModules.title: Red Team & Blue Team Intro
topics: Labs: Wi-Fi scan, hash cracking, log triage & detection rules

cyberIntroCurriculumModules.title: Incident Response & Career Prep
topics: Governance: NIST CSF, ISO 27001, risk management
Cyber team roles: CISO, SOC analyst, pentester
Final CTF: Red Team vs Blue Team + portfolio building

cyberBootcampHeroSubtitle: Go from beginner to confident Junior Penetration Tester. Learn network scanning, vulnerability assessment, and exploit execution in our comprehensive Cybersecurity Bootcamp.
cyberBootcampCertSubtitle: Prepare for the eLearnSecurity Junior Penetration Tester cert with our rigorous, hands-on labs.
cyberBootcampCard1Desc: Learn practical attacks on networks and hosts, simulating real-world threat actor behaviors.
cyberBootcampCard2Desc: Identify and exploit vulnerabilities in modern web applications, mastering essential security concepts.
cyberBootcampCard3Desc: Master scanning tools, interpret results, and define actionable remediation strategies.
cyberBootcampCard4Desc: Practice with exam-like environments to guarantee you pass your eLearnSecurity certification.
cyberBootcampCurriculumSubtitle: An intensive 16-week program at 12h/week — covering everything from networking fundamentals to advanced exploitation and Blue Team defense.

cyberBootcampCurriculumModules.title: Network Basics
topics: Understanding how data travels across the Internet

cyberBootcampCurriculumModules.title: Linux for Cybersecurity
topics: Using the terminal for security testing

cyberBootcampCurriculumModules.title: Introduction to Red Teaming
topics: The different phases of an attack
MITRE ATT&CK and Kill Chain frameworks

cyberBootcampCurriculumModules.title: Advanced Labs & Career Prep
topics: Red Team vs Blue Team scenarios
Intro to Threat Intelligence and forensics

genaiHeroSubtitle: Radically transform your productivity in 8 weeks. Learn to harness ChatGPT, automate your workflows with n8n and Microsoft 365, and multiply your professional output by 10.
genaiHeroChatMsg1: Generate a weekly marketing report automatically.
genaiHeroChatMsg2: Report generated. n8n workflow triggered. 4 tasks automated.
genaiFeaturesTitle: Everything You Need to Automate Your Success
genaiFeaturesSubtitle: A hands-on programme to master generative AI and automate your business tasks — no coding background needed.
genaiCard1Desc: Master the art of talking to AI. Craft precise prompts, use Persona models and Few-Shot techniques to get professional-grade results every single time.
genaiCard2Desc: Connect your tools, eliminate repetitive tasks, and build smart pipelines with n8n, Make and APIs. Save hours every week through intelligent automation.
genaiCard3Desc: Concretely apply AI to digital marketing, content generation, SEO, and creating professional slides and videos.
genaiCard4Desc: Hands-on projects from Week 1. Automate emails, generate reports, create content at scale — and show tangible results.
genaiCurriculumSubtitle: A structured, hands-on journey from beginner to expert in generative AI and business task automation.
genaiContactSubtitle: Ready to 10x your productivity? Leave us your details and one of our advisors will reach out within 24 hours.

genaiCurriculumModules.title: Discovering the World of AI
topics: Introduction to AI and how models work
Overview of generative AI and LLMs (ChatGPT, Grok, Qwen)
Understanding business use cases and productivity gains
First steps with popular AI tools

genaiCurriculumModules.title: Prompt Engineering
topics: How to create and structure effective prompts
Persona model concepts and AI customisation
Prompt limitations and how to work around them

genaiCurriculumModules.title: Cognitive Verification & Persona Audience
topics: Adapting content for a target audience
Building responses suited to different contexts

genaiCurriculumModules.title: Advanced Prompt Models
topics: Few-Shot Learning to guide the AI
Learning models to improve response quality

genaiCurriculumModules.title: Advanced AI Capabilities
topics: Using AI to analyse images, PDFs, and links
Generating slides, videos, and visual content

genaiCurriculumModules.title: Automation & n8n
topics: Intro to low-code automation with n8n
Building workflows and integrating APIs & external services
Automating emails, notifications, and data processing

genaiCurriculumModules.title: Microsoft Office 365 with AI
topics: Using AI in Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and Outlook
Generating professional documents, reports and presentations

genaiCurriculumModules.title: Digital Marketing with AI
topics: Applying AI to improve SEO and visibility
Content creation, copywriting, and editorial strategy
Generating professional marketing slides and videos

pbiHeroSubtitle: Turn raw data into powerful strategic decisions. Master Power BI, DAX and Power Query to build professional dashboards and earn the PL-300 certification.
pbiFeaturesTitle: Everything You Need to Become a Data Analyst
pbiFeaturesSubtitle: A complete programme covering data collection, transformation, modelling and visualisation — all the way to certification.
pbiCard1Desc: Connect your data, build robust models and create interactive dashboards that speak to your decision-makers — all without writing a single line of code.
pbiCard2Desc: Clean and transform any data source with Power Query. Create advanced calculations and dynamic KPIs with the DAX language for ever-sharper insights.
pbiCard3Desc: Build impactful charts, interactive drill-down reports and dashboards that tell a clear story using BI data visualisation UX/UI best practices.
pbiCard4Desc: Prepare for the Microsoft Power BI Data Analyst certification (PL-300) with exam-style practice cases and a full end-to-end data analysis project.
pbiCurriculumSubtitle: A structured journey from raw data to published professional report — including PL-300 certification preparation.
pbiContactSubtitle: Ready to turn your data into a competitive advantage? Leave us your details and one of our advisors will reach out within 24h.

pbiCurriculumModules.title: Foundations: Data, Power BI & Power Query
topics: Data analysis fundamentals and the data analyst role
Discovering Power BI Desktop and its ecosystem
Connecting to data sources (Excel, CSV, databases, web)
Cleaning and transforming data with Power Query (M language)

pbiCurriculumModules.title: Data Modelling & DAX Calculations
topics: Creating table relationships and star schema
Optimising the data model for performance
Introduction to DAX: calculated columns and simple measures
Advanced DAX: CALCULATE, FILTER, Time Intelligence (YTD, MTD)

pbiCurriculumModules.title: Visualisation, Reports & Optimisation
topics: Building charts and UX/UI best practices for data viz
Interactive dashboards, drill-down, slicers and storytelling
Page navigation and bookmarks for dynamic reports
Performance optimisation and the Performance Analyzer

pbiCurriculumModules.title: Publishing, Governance & Final Project
topics: Publishing to Power BI Service and managing workspaces
Sharing, collaboration and scheduling data refreshes
Data security: Row-Level Security (RLS) and governance
Complete end-to-end data analysis project — raw data to published report

ecomHeroSubtitle: Master e-commerce from start to finish in 8 weeks. Build your Shopify store, run powerful ad campaigns and grow a digital brand that sells — even while you sleep.
ecomFeaturesTitle: Everything You Need to Sell Online
ecomFeaturesSubtitle: A results-driven programme designed to transform you into a profitable, self-sufficient e-commerce entrepreneur.
ecomCard1Desc: Build and configure a professional Shopify store from scratch. Themes, products, payments, shipping — we cover everything so you're ready to sell from Week 1.
ecomCard2Desc: Launch profitable Facebook Ads, Instagram Ads and Google Ads campaigns. Master targeting, tracking and continuous optimisation to maximise your return on investment.
ecomCard3Desc: Attract customers organically: optimise your store for search engines, create content that converts and build a lasting online presence.
ecomCard4Desc: Interpret your Google Analytics and Shopify data to make profitable decisions — and scale what's working.
ecomCurriculumTitle: 12 Weeks to Launch Your Online Business
ecomCurriculumSubtitle: From product niche to paid ads — a complete journey to build, optimise and scale a professional e-commerce store.
ecomContactSubtitle: Ready to launch your online store? Leave us your details and one of our advisors will reach out within 24 hours.

ecomCurriculumModules.title: E-Commerce Foundations & Online Store
topics: Introduction to e-commerce, business models (B2C, B2B, dropshipping) and market trends
Finding a winning product: tools, competitor analysis and business idea validation
Building a store on Shopify / WordPress: theme, design and site structure
Full store configuration and going live

ecomCurriculumModules.title: Optimisation, Logistics & Digital Marketing
topics: High-converting product pages: copywriting, UX and trust elements (reviews, guarantees)
Payment setup, order management, logistics and sales process automation
Digital marketing fundamentals, sales funnel and customer acquisition strategy

ecomCurriculumModules.title: Meta Ads, Content & Advanced Marketing
topics: Meta Ads (Facebook / Instagram): create, target and analyse your campaigns
Visuals, video ads and copywriting — using AI to speed up content production
Email marketing, retargeting, remarketing and customer retention
Advanced acquisition strategies and marketing automation

ecomCurriculumModules.title: CRO, Scaling & Final Project
topics: Conversion Rate Optimisation (CRO): user behaviour analysis, A/B testing and page optimisation
Scaling campaigns, performance management and ad cost optimisation
Business automation and passing to the next level of scale
Final project: complete store, product launch and full marketing campaign
